headline: Why KLA (KLAC) Is Down 6.2% After Iran-Linked Chip Sell-Off Ahead Of Investor Day
summary: In recent days, KLA Corporation has been caught up in a broad semiconductor sector sell-off linked to geopolitical tensions in Iran that pressured chipmakers globally. At the same time, KLA remains a focus for investors ahead of its March 12 Investor Day, where updated long-term goals and product plans are expected to be outlined. Against this backdrop of geopolitically driven sector volatility, we’ll examine how renewed attention on KLA’s process-control franchise could influence its...

headline: Where is KLA Corporation (KLAC) Headed According to the Street?
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the best semiconductor equipment stocks to invest in now. KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) received several rating updates in February. On February 26, Citi opened an “upside 30-day catalyst watch” on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) and maintained a Buy rating on the shares, setting a price target of $1,800. The firm believes […]
